repos.description: First-entry automation bot for Kalshi. Detects new market listings the moment they appear in the API and enters within seconds before opening prices reprice. Supports both new listing sniping and price-level sniping on existing markets.

repos.name: polymarket-kelly-sizer
repos.description: Kelly criterion position sizing calculator and trade executor for Polymarket. Computes optimal USDC per trade from your historical win rate and market odds. Supports full Kelly, fractional Kelly, category-specific, and adaptive modes.

repos.name: polymarket-sniper-bot
repos.description: First-entry automation bot for Polymarket. Detects new market listings the moment they appear on-chain and enters within seconds before opening odds reprice. Also supports odds-level sniping on existing markets.

repos.name: polymarket-resolution-tracker
repos.description: Resolution monitoring and payout management tool for Polymarket. Tracks all open positions across multiple wallets, sends Telegram alerts 24h and 6h before each resolution deadline, and optionally claims winning payouts automatically.
